hooks.command: sh -c 'dir=$PWD; while [ "$dir" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$dir/STATION.md" ]; do dir=$(dirname "$dir"); done; hook="$dir/.codex/hooks/session-context.sh"; [ -f "$hook" ] && sh "$hook" || true'
sh -c 'dir=$PWD; while [ "$dir" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$dir/STATION.md" ]; do dir=$(dirname "$dir"); done; hook="$dir/.codex/hooks/stop-reminder.sh"; [ -f "$hook" ] && sh "$hook" || true'
